meta.title: Seedance Lite AI Video Generator | Fast & Affordable | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create high-quality videos with ByteDance Seedance Lite. Fast, affordable video generation with up to 4 reference images, first-last frame control, and smooth motion. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: ByteDance's efficient video generation model. Seedance Lite delivers high-quality videos with support for up to 4 reference images, first-last frame control, and smooth motion - all at a budget-friendly price.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Seedance Lite ideal for efficient video creation

multiReference.title: Multi-Reference Support
multiReference.description: Use up to 4 reference images to guide your video generation. Maintain subject consistency and control scene composition with multiple visual inputs.

firstLastFrame.title: First & Last Frame Control
firstLastFrame.description: Provide start and end frames to generate smooth, coherent transitions. Perfect for controlled motion and precise animations.

smoothMotion.title: Smooth & Stable Motion
smoothMotion.description: Wide dynamic range enables smooth generation of large-scale movements while maintaining stability and physical realism.

speed.title: Fast Generation
speed.description: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Generate high-quality videos quickly for rapid iteration and time-sensitive projects.

affordable.title: Budget-Friendly
affordable.description: Lower cost per generation makes it accessible for content creators. Get professional results without breaking the bank.

styles.title: Diverse Styles
styles.description: From photorealism to illustration, Seedance Lite accurately interprets diverse stylistic prompts to support your creative vision.

0.question: What is Seedance Lite and who developed it?
0.answer: Seedance Lite is ByteDance's efficient video generation model, developed by the team behind TikTok and CapCut. It's designed for fast, affordable video generation while maintaining high quality.

1.question: What's the difference between Seedance Lite and Seedance Pro?
1.answer: Seedance Lite is optimized for speed and cost-efficiency, ideal for rapid iteration and budget-conscious projects. Seedance Pro offers maximum quality and is better suited for complex, production-grade content.

2.question: How many reference images can I use?
2.answer: Seedance Lite supports up to 4 reference images in multi-reference mode. This allows you to maintain subject consistency and control scene composition with multiple visual inputs.

3.question: What video durations and resolutions are supported?
3.answer: Seedance Lite generates videos at 480p or 720p resolution with durations of 5 or 10 seconds. It supports both landscape and portrait aspect ratios.

4.question: Does Seedance Lite support first-last frame control?
4.answer: Yes! You can provide a starting and ending image, and Seedance Lite will generate a smooth transition between them. This is ideal for controlled motion and precise animations.

5.question: What styles can Seedance Lite generate?
5.answer: Seedance Lite supports diverse styles from photorealism and cyberpunk to illustration and felt texture. It accurately interprets stylistic prompts to support a wide range of creative needs.
